$comment: QuizAttemptRequest — emitted when a student starts a topic quiz or summative. This is the trigger that asks the catalog/AI server for a fresh set of items. Two concrete samples follow under 'examples', and every key is documented in 'keyReference'.
title: QuizAttemptRequest

topicId.description: Set for mode=topic. null for mode=summative (aggregates all topics in the lesson).

seed.description: Deterministic RNG seed. Same seed + same templates => same generated item set (reproducible / offline-syncable).

focusTopicIds.description: For mode=remedial: topicIds derived from StudentSummativeResults.failedItems to weight item selection.

SummativeConfig.description: Drives summative item generation/aggregation. Only present when mode=summative.

total.description: Perfect score the raw score is normalized to.

itemsPerTopic.description: How many items to draw/generate per topic.

templateIds.description: Which question templates (see quiz_generation_templates.json) are eligible.

examples.$label: Topic quiz trigger (3 items for the Muscular System)
examples.subject: science

examples.$label: Summative trigger (20-pt exam aggregating all L1 topics)
examples.subject: science

keyReference.lessonId: Maps to Lesson.id in lesson_catalog. Selects the pool of topics.
keyReference.topicId: Maps to Topic.id. For topic mode, restricts items to that topic's quiz pool + generated variants.
keyReference.quizzesPerTopic: Per-topic quiz size (3 in current app; perfectScore per topic = 3).
keyReference.summativeConfig.total: Normalization target (20). Raw correct count is scaled to /20.
keyReference.summativeConfig.itemsPerTopic: Generation breadth per topic for the summative.
keyReference.templateIds: Selects which generators in quiz_generation_templates.json may produce items.
keyReference.seed: Makes generation deterministic so the same exam can be regenerated on any node without re-sync.
keyReference.focusTopicIds: Remedial weighting from failedItems so weak topics get more items.
